name: Luncheon Omelet
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh dill (1/2 tablespoon dried), minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet.
2. Add mushrooms and scallions and sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add snap peas and tomatoes. Cook for 3 more minutes.
4. Whisk eggs with cream and dill.
5. Melt butter in a non-stick omelet pan or skillet.
6. Pour in egg mixture. Spread cheese on eggs.
7. Follow Basic Omelet directions.
